sections.title: Getting started
Searching the armour chest
Talking to Lady Servil

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there. Looks like you're in some trouble.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: The cart? That's the least of my problems. I've got to find my family...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your family? Can I help?

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: You'd be willing to?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course. Tell me what happened.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Well, I'm Lady Servil. I was travelling to Ardougne with my husband, Justin, and son, Sammy, when our cart broke on some rocks.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Some of General Khazard's men spotted us and offered to help, but they demanded my husband and son fight in their arena first! We said no, but they took them anyway!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: General Khazard?

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: He's a menace! This entire area is under the control of him and his mercenary group, the Khazard Army. They prey on the weak and vulnerable, making them fight in that arena of theirs, all for entertainment!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's horrible! How are they able to get away with it?

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: The authorities don't care. Khazard's men just pay them off if they ever come to investigate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well they won't stop me. I'm going to try my best to find your family.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Thank you. They'll be somewhere inside the arena. I'll be waiting here for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I hope it works out. Good luck.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Adventurer, please... bring back my family. They'll be somewhere inside the arena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll find them.

sections.title: Talking to Spectator after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Hello, stranger. Are you here for the fight arena?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I am.

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Anything in particular?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just visiting some friends.

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Inside? Are you sure about that? Only Khazard guards are allowed in there. Unless you know where to get some of their armour, you won't be visiting anyone.

sections.title: Entering the arena
Talking to off-duty Khazard Guard by the armour chest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Well I'm off-duty right now, so why don't you go and bother someone else.

sections.title: Opening the armour chest
Searching the armour chest
Talking to Lady Servil after getting armour

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Have you had any luck with freeing my family?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've managed to get a guard's uniform, hopefully I can infiltrate the arena.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Please hurry.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard Guard by the armour chest after stealing the armour

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Despicable thieving scum!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: None of your business. Clear off!

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Someone came in and stole my armour!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no! I'll let you know if I see anyone suspicious...

sections.title: Talking to the Door Guard with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Door Guard
lines.text: Are you new? I've never seen you around here before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You could say that. Long live General Khazard!

lines.speaker: Door Guard
lines.text: Er... yeah...

sections.title: Talking to Khazard Guards with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: There should be some good fights today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Keep an eye out for anything suspicious.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: I think I'll head to the bar on my next break.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Don't bother me while I'm on duty.

sections.title: Talking to Spectator after getting the armour

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Hello there. I hear the Servil family are fighting soon. Should be very entertaining.

sections.title: Talking to a Khazard Guard inside the building with the armour unequipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: What are you doing here? Leave at once!

sections.title: Opening door while a Khazard Guard is nearby

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This door appears to be locked.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Nice observation guard. You could have just asked to be let in like a normal person.

sections.title: Talking to Joe or Kelvin

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do either of you know of the Servil family?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: If we did, why would we tell a guard?

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: Until our last breath, our every action will be against Khazard. Never will we help you.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: I spit on Khazard, and all who do his bidding.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do either of you know of the Servil family?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: I've heard of them, but if your hope is to help them, I fear you may be too late.

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: You should leave while you can. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.

sections.title: Talking to Slave

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I'm looking for the Servil family.

lines.speaker: Slave
lines.text: Please leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Slave
lines.text: I've never heard of them.

sections.title: Talking to Hengrad

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Hmm... You don't seem like a real guard to me. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No one important. I'm looking for the Servil family.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: I've seen them in here, but my advice to you is to leave them. Whatever plan you have will only end with you in a cell as well.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: You're not a guard. What are you doing in here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the Servil family.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: I've seen them in here, but my advice to you is to leave them. Whatever plan you have will only end with you in a cell as well.

sections.title: Opening door to the arena
Opening a prison gate
Talking to the Head Guard with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Long live General Khazard!

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Er... yes... quite right. Did you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just checking if you have any orders for me.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Not right now. Things are all very boring at the moment. What I'd give to be over at the bar having a nice Khali brew...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khali brew? Can't say I've ever had one.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Oh, nothing beats them! Mind you, don't make the mistake of having too many. Last time I did, I ended up falling straight to sleep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good to know, thanks.

sections.title: Talking to the Head Guard again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: What a boring day. You'd think the slaves would be more entertaining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not long now until you get a break though, right?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Too right! Then it's straight to the bar for a nice Khali brew.

sections.title: Talking to the Head Guard without Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: This area is restricted. Leave now!

sections.title: Getting the keys
Talking to Sammy Servil

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. Are you Sammy?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Please... don't hurt me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm here to help. Where do they keep the keys?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: The Head Guard has them. He's the one with the big sword.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't lose heart, I'll be back.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Sammy.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Hello. Do you have the keys?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Please hurry. The Head Guard has them. He's the one with the big sword.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after entering the arena

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil, I have managed to infiltrate General Khazard's arena.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: And my family?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Please hurry.

sections.title: Talking to Joe or Kelvin

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Joe/Kelvin
lines.text: Get away! One day we'll have our revenge on you all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Joe/Kelvin
lines.text: Spare us your fake pity. I spit on Khazard, and all who do his bidding.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Joe/Kelvin
lines.text: You're not safe here, traveller. Leave while you still can.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Joe/Kelvin
lines.text: You're brave coming in here. If the guards get you, you'll be the next one in a cell.

sections.title: Talking to a slave

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Slave
lines.text: Please leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Slave
lines.text: Why am I here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Slave
lines.text: Please leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Slave
lines.text: What did I do to deserve this?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Slave
lines.text: You're not safe here. Leave while you can.

sections.title: Talking to Hengrad

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Hmm... You don't seem like a real guard to me. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No one important.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: If you say so.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: You're not a guard. What are you doing in here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing important.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: If you say so.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard barman after learning about the Khali brew

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: Hi, what can I get you? We have a range of quality brews.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a Khali brew please.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: That'll be five gold coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough room for one.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: There you go, that's five gold coins. I suggest lying down before you drink it. That way you have less distance to collapse.

sections.title: Talking to the Head Guard while holding Khali brew

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: What a boring day. You'd think the slaves would be more entertaining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you still fancy a drink?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: I really shouldn't...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Oh... okay then, but just the one.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: That is some gooood stuff... yeah... wooh, yeah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Yeesshh! Oooh, maybe I sshould relax for a while.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good idea. I'll look after the prisoners.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Yeesh... that shounds reasonable. Here, take the keysch. Any trouble, you give... you give 'em a good beating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll keep them in line

sections.title: Talking to the Head Guard after getting the keys

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Pleash... leave me alone. Did the walls always shway soooo much?

sections.title: Talking to the Head Guard after losing the keys

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, er... I lost the keys.

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: What? You're foolish... and I'm all drunk. Here... takes my shpare shh... set!

sections.title: Talking to the Head Guard after getting him drunk without Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Head Guard
lines.text: Thish areash resh... restricted! We don't like strangersh... 'specially ones who sway. Oooh!

sections.title: Using keys on a cell that does not contain Sammy Servil

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The gate is locked, but Sammy's not in there anyway.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy Servil after getting the keys

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sammy look, I have the keys.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Wow! Please hurry and set me free.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We'll need to wait for the guards to change shift, but don't worry, you'll be out soon...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, the coast is clear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now, let's get you out of here.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Not yet! We need to find my dad!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sammy, wait!

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Quick, help him!

sections.title: The battles
Trying to exit the arena through the door
Re-entering the arena
Talking to a spectator

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Hello there. I hear Khazard's got some great fights lined up today. I can't wait!

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Hello, stranger. I hear Khazard's got some great fights lined up today. I can't wait!

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after freeing Sammy from the jail

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil, I freed your son, but he went to help your husband.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: No! Please, you have to help them!

sections.title: Upon killing the Khazard Ogre

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Well, well, well, you seem to be in quite the rush. Do you have somewhere else to be?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Oh no...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: General Khazard, I presume?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You presume correct. I must say, I sense a great air of defiance to you. Does my appearance not fill you with fear?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've seen worse.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: How arrogant. No matter though, you will come to learn.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Now, despite your entertaining show, the two individuals you are attempting to leave with are my property.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They belong to nobody!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Ha! Well if their freedom is so valuable to you, how about a trade? Fight in my arena, and if you win, I'll let them go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what if I refuse your offer?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Well... I wasn't actually giving you a choice. Guards, take [him/her/them] to the cells.

sections.title: Talking to a spectator after defeating the ogre
Talking to a Door Guard

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Door Guard
lines.text: So you're back for more are you? General Khazard will be pleased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Hey, you're the one from the arena! That was some great fighting!

sections.title: Talking to Hengrad in the jail cell
Talking to Hengrad after teleporting out of a fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: I don't know how you managed to escape, but you may not be as lucky next time. Get out of here while you can.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Hello there. So Khazard got his hands on you too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Unfortunately so.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Well if you're lucky, you might last as long as me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long have you been here?

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: As long as I can remember. I was a child when his men kidnapped me. My whole life has been spent killing and fighting, all in the hope that one day I might escape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't give up.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Thanks, friend.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Wait... sounds like the guard is coming. Looks like you'll be going back into the arena. Good luck, friend.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Now watch closely, friends. I fear this may be where your protector dies.

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: Ignore him! You can do it!

sections.title: Upon killing the scorpion

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Impressive, but now for a proper challenge. Time for my puppy. Bring on Bouncer!

sections.title: Upon killing Bouncer
Opening the door to the arena after Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: You! You're the one who killed Bouncer.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Die you monster!

sections.title: Talking to the Spectator after defeating Khazard

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Hey, you're the one who beat Bouncer! Amazing!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Bouncer! No!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You monster! You'll pay for what you've done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I only did what you asked. I fought in your arena. Now let the Servils go.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Fine! I am not a coward who makes false promises. I have no need of them anyway. You on the other hand, won't be going anywhere.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Guard, escort the Servils out. I'll take great pleasure in dealing with this one myself!

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Don't try to fight him! Just run!

sections.title: Upon defeating General Khazard

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Going somewhere?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... I killed you!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Ha! Arrogant fool! You think you can kill me? I am General Khazard! My power is absolute!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Now, part of me would very much like to kill you for what you've done today, but let it be known that I am not without generosity.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You proved yourself in battle against me. That is something few can boast of. For that, you may leave. However, if you ever oppose me again, I won't hesitate to wipe you from existence!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Now go. I have business to attend to elsewhere that is far more important than you.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: You're alive! I feared General Khazard would have killed you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He tried, but I escaped.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Thank goodness. I'd have never forgiven myself if you'd have died saving my family.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Now, you'll be pleased to know that my son and husband are safe and recovering at home. Without you they would certainly be dead. Thank you, for everything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not a problem.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Please, take this payment. It's the least you deserve.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after defeating Khazard

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: You're alive! I feared General Khazard would have killed you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He tried, but I was able to defeat him.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: You killed General Khazard?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought I had at first, but it seems he is not that easy to kill.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Well, at least you're alive.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Now, you'll be pleased to know that my son and husband are safe and recovering at home. Without you they would certainly be dead. Thank you, for everything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not a problem.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Please, take this payment. It's the least you deserve.
